html:
Exclusive to:

For detailed farming informations, see Farm Plant.

The Asparagus Fern is an object exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in the Reap What You Sow update. It can be obtained by planting Tubular Seeds (also named Asparagus Seeds, if researched with the Gardeneer Hat) into Farm Soil or on the ground as Wormwood. There is a chance to grow an Asparagus Fern by planting regular Seeds.

The plant's favourite seasons are Winter and Spring, so in Autumn and Summer it will grow slower and accumulate more Stress points.

When harvesting in the full stage, it will give 1 Asparagus and 0-2 Tubular/Asparagus Seeds depending on the amount of stress points the plant accumulated. It can also grow into a Giant Asparagus, if the plant accumulated only 0-1 stress points. When picked and hammered, it will drop 2-3 Asparagus and 2-3 Tubular/Asparagus Seeds.

The Asparagus stays 4 days on the plant before rotting and the Giant Asparagus stays 6 Days on the plant. If it has been planted by Wormwood, it lasts 50% longer before spoiling. Picking the plant in its rotten stage will give 1 Rot (normal) or 3 Rot and 1 Asparagus Seed (giant). After 4 to 5 days of being in the rotten stage, a non-giant Asparagus Plant grows back, but the new plant cannot become giant.

When picking up a rotten plant, a Fruit Fly has a 5% chance to spawn.

Gallery

  • Asparagus Fern in Plant Registry.

{{for|detailed farming informations|Farm Plant}}
The '''Asparagus Fern''' is an object exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', introduced in the ''[[Reap What You Sow]]'' update. It can be obtained by planting [[Crop Seeds/DST#Tubular Seeds|Tubular Seeds]] (also named Asparagus Seeds, if researched with the [[Gardeneer Hat]]) into [[Farm Soil]] or on the ground as [[Wormwood]]. There is a chance to grow an Asparagus Fern by planting regular [[Seeds]].

The plant's favourite seasons are [[Winter]] and [[Spring]], so in [[Autumn]] and [[Summer]] it will grow slower and accumulate more [[Farm Plant#Stress|Stress]] points.

When harvesting in the full stage, it will give 1 [[Asparagus/DST|Asparagus]] and 0-2 Tubular/Asparagus Seeds depending on the amount of stress points the plant accumulated. It can also grow into a [[Giant Crops#Giant Asparagus|Giant Asparagus]], if the plant accumulated only 0-1 stress points. When picked and [[hammer]]ed, it will drop 2-3 Asparagus and 2-3 Tubular/Asparagus Seeds.

The Asparagus stays 4 days on the plant before rotting and the Giant Asparagus stays 6 [[Day]]s on the plant. If it has been planted by Wormwood, it lasts 50% longer before spoiling. Picking the plant in its rotten stage will give 1 [[Rot]] (normal) or 3 Rot and 1 Asparagus Seed (giant). After 4 to 5 days of being in the rotten stage, a non-giant Asparagus Plant grows back, but the new plant cannot become giant.

When picking up a rotten plant, a [[Fruit Fly]] has a 5% chance to spawn.
